full_text:
Liu Weitai 劉緯臺
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Weitai (劉緯臺). Disreputable fortune teller, became oath brother with Gongsun Zan. Liu Weitai was affiliated with Gongsun Zan.
